summary: Comprehensive testing of Appointment Booking, Feedback System, and Amazon Order Feedback Calls features. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified via UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All appointment booking, feedback survey, and Amazon order feedback call features are fully functional. Customer can book appointments with supervisors, provide feedback on closed tickets, and call support can manage Amazon order feedback calls.

customer_appointments_page.sidebar_navigation: PASS - 'Book Appointment' link in customer sidebar
customer_appointments_page.dashboard_button: PASS - 'Book Appointment' card on customer dashboard
customer_appointments_page.calendar_component: PASS - Calendar for date selection visible

supervisor_calendar_page.stats_cards: PASS - Total Appointments, Pending, Confirmed, Completed, No Shows stats
supervisor_calendar_page.appointments_list: PASS - Shows appointments for selected date

customer_feedback_on_tickets.tickets_page: PASS - Customer can view tickets list
customer_feedback_on_tickets.closed_ticket_view: PASS - Can open ticket details dialog
customer_feedback_on_tickets.provide_feedback_button: PASS - 'Provide Feedback' button visible on closed tickets

call_support_feedback_calls.pending_feedback_calls_stat: PASS - 'Pending Feedback Calls' stat card visible
call_support_feedback_calls.feedback_calls_tab: PASS - 'Feedback Calls' tab present with count
call_support_feedback_calls.amazon_order_info: PASS - Shows 'Amazon Order Feedback Calls' description
call_support_feedback_calls.feedback_calls_list: PASS - Table shows pending feedback calls (currently 0)

accountant_amazon_order.amazon_order_option: PASS - 'Amazon Order' option available in dropdown
accountant_amazon_order.form_fields: PASS - Order ID, Payment Reference, Invoice file, Customer details fields

admin_analytics_page.stats_cards: PASS - Total Agents, Total Closed, SLA Breaches, Avg SLA Compliance

backend_endpoints_tested.authentication: PASS - All 5 user roles can login
